# signoz_planned_maintenance (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "signoz_planned_maintenance" "weekly_db" {
  name        = "weekly-db-maintenance"
  description = "Silence database alerts during the weekly maintenance window."
  alert_ids   = ["1", "2"]

  schedule = {
    timezone   = "UTC"
    start_time = "2026-01-01T02:00:00Z"
    end_time   = "2026-01-01T04:00:00Z"

    recurrence = {
      repeat_type = "weekly"
      repeat_on   = ["sunday"]
      duration    = "2h0m0s"
    }
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)
- `schedule` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--schedule))

### Optional

- `alert_ids` (List of String)
- `description` (String)
- `scope` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `kind` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--schedule"></a>
### Nested Schema for `schedule`

- `start_time` (String)
- `timezone` (String)

Optional:

- `end_time` (String)
- `recurrence` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--schedule--recurrence))

<a id="nestedatt--schedule--recurrence"></a>
### Nested Schema for `schedule.recurrence`

Required:

- `duration` (String)
- `repeat_type` (String)

Optional:

- `repeat_on` (List of String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Planned maintenance windows are imported using their ID.
terraform import signoz_planned_maintenance.weekly_db 1
```
